context_system-account-quota: This is a system account for bundle snapshots and changelogs. Its quota is updated automatically and should not be edited manually unless bundle controller is turned off.
context_cluster-admin-edit-bundle: If you are a cluster administrator, edit bundle attribute to increase account resource limits. The default multiplier is 1.
context_regular-user-contact-support: If you are a regular user and you notice that the resource limits are violated, please contact the support.
